mapper.sql: SELECT p.pw_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.last_modifier, p.type_id, t.type_name, p.requester_id, req.name AS requester_name, p.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.dept_id AS user_dept_id, d.dept_name AS user_dept_name, p.approver_id, apv.name AS approver_name, p.account_id, p.changed_at, p.expire_at, p.change_reason, p.confirmed_at, p.confirmed_by, cnf.name AS confirmer_name, p.note FROM tb_password p JOIN tb_account_type t ON t.type_id = p.type_id JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_department d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN tb_user req ON req.user_id = p.requester_id LEFT JOIN tb_user apv ON apv.user_id = p.approver_id LEFT JOIN tb_user cnf ON cnf.user_id = p.confirmed_by

where.if: AND (p.account_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: ORDER BY p.pw_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_password p JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_password SET last_modifier = #{lastModifier}, type_id = #{typeId}, user_id = #{userId}, approver_id = #{approverId}, account_id = #{accountId}, changed_at = #{changedAt}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, change_reason = #{changeReason}, note = #{note}, confirmed_at = NULL, confirmed_by = NULL WHERE pw_id = #{pwId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_password WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_password SET requester_id = NULL WHERE requester_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_password SET approver_id = NULL WHERE approver_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_password SET confirmed_by = NULL WHERE confirmed_by = #{userId}
